message:
chore: update audit index and beads issue tracker

audit_index.jsonl:
- Add batch 475/476 entries for SapphireHill agent audits covering
  browser_storage closure lifetime fix, security context verified-flag
  semantics, analyzer_plugin duplicate-finding rejection, and
  collector clone-shares-min-level fix.

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Sync beads state with completed and in-progress work items from
  concurrent agent sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
